headline: NANC Traders Beat the Crowd by 33 Points and the Difference Keeps Growing
summary: Two unconventional ETFs promise to monetize information edges that traditional fund managers ignore. The Unusual Whales Subversive Democratic Trading ETF (NASDAQ:NANC) mirrors stocks disclosed by Democratic members of Congress under the STOCK Act, while the VanEck Social Sentiment ETF (NYSEARCA:BUZZ) uses natural language processing to score social media chatter around large-cap US stocks. Both test ... NANC Traders Beat the Crowd by 33 Points and the Difference Keeps Growing

headline: Creator content made the main stage at TV's 'upfront' pitches — and not just for YouTube
summary: In media companies' annual pitch to advertisers this week, creator content played a bigger role as a new category for reaching younger audiences.

raw.headline: Creator content made the main stage at TV's 'upfront' pitches — and not just for YouTube

headline: Netflix (NFLX) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
summary: Shares of streaming video giant Netflix (NASDAQ: NFLX) jumped 2.4% in the afternoon session after reports revealed the company's advertising business is scaling faster than Wall Street had expected, with confidence building ahead of presentation to advertisers on May 14.

raw.headline: Netflix (NFLX) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
